description: Informal Chechnya-based detachments of Russian state security forces, effectively serving as Ramzan Kadyrov's private army. Founded in the late 1990s, they have been accused of widespread human rights abuses including torture and extrajudicial killings. They have participated in conflicts such as the Syrian Civil War and the Russian invasion of Ukraine.

country_links.evidence_quote: Kadyrovite police units were deployed on the ground in Aleppo to 'preserve order' and engage in civic outreach.
country_links.context: Kadyrovite police units were deployed on the ground in Aleppo to preserve order and engage in civic outreach.

country_links.evidence_quote: Kadyrovite volunteer units participated in the 2022 Russian invasion of Ukraine... Chechen troops were seen fighting in the Siege of Mariupol.
country_links.context: Kadyrovite volunteer units participated in the 2022 Russian invasion of Ukraine, fighting in battles such as the Siege of Mariupol.
